prompt.content:
Our client, Forma, requires deeper customer insights regarding their brand preference. Please use the brand preference final data to provide the following insights in the console:

1) For each of the 10 purchase drivers, identify which brand is preferred by the highest number of users. In case of a tie, pick the brand alphabetically.

2) How many users have very high loyalty towards Forma? Any user who selects a brand as the most preferred across three or more purchase drivers is considered to have very high brand loyalty. While this is rare, a user may theoretically have very high brand loyalty toward more than one brand.

3) Which brands have a higher number of very high–loyal users compared to Forma? How many very high loyal users does each of these brands have?

4) Across customer selections for style and pricing, which brand pair occurs most frequently? How many times is the pair selected? Report multiple pairs in case of a tie.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Here are the insights from brand preference data:

1) Most preferred brand across purchase drivers 
- Price: Article
- Style: Apt2B
- Quality: Interior Define
- Delivery speed: Forma
- Delivery cost: Forma 
- Reviews: Arhaus
- Returns: The Inside
- Assembly service: Poly & Bark
- Warranty: BenchMade Modern
- Brand reputation: The Inside

2) 41 Users have very high loyalty towards Forma

3) Following brands have more very high loyal users as compared to Forma
- Arhaus : 44 users 
- Apt2B: 42 users

4) Across customer selections for style and pricing, the brand pair that occurs most frequently is BenchMade Modern and Havenly. This pair is selected 24 times.
